name: MiniMax Hailuo 2.3 Fast
description: A lower-latency version of Hailuo 2.3 that preserves core motion quality, visual consistency, and stylization while enabling faster iteration.

examples.name: Basic I2V
examples.description: Animate a photo with default settings

input.prompt: Gentle movement and subtle animation, natural-looking motion

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl
code_snippets.code:
curl https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID/ai/run \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "model": "minimax/hailuo-2.3-fast",
  "input": {
    "prompt": "Gentle movement and subtle animation, natural-looking motion",
    "duration": 6,
    "fast_pretreatment": false,
    "first_frame_image": "https://replicate.delivery/xezq/MQpUhqkESIIQDlWUxtNcsznZLfUTmhEbCV3vdAZGHGPwwaMLA/tmpgl4gvv5n.jpeg",
    "prompt_optimizer": true,
    "resolution": "768P"
  }
}'

input.prompt: Camera slowly pans across the scene with cinematic depth of field

    "prompt_optimizer": true,

examples.name: Fast Processing
examples.description: Quick I2V with fast pretreatment enabled

  --header "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \

first_frame_image.description: URL or base64 data URI of the first frame image
